title: cyclosorus siamensis
intro: Cyclosorus siamensis, also known as Thai water fern or Siam fern, is a species of fern that is native to Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cyclosorus siamensis include reducing fever, relieving headaches and body aches, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping its leaves in hot water, or it can be used in traditional medicine preparations such as decoctions and tinctures.
